CustomObject.label: VS Service
CustomObject.description: F-001 slot-booking-core (VS-01, EP-01). Generic service catalogue (vaccination in F-001; a service-type field keeps OPD additive later per D-012 — build nothing OPD-specific). OWD Public Read Only (design §2.2). Retention class (Annexure C4): permanent reference — never purged by VS_RetentionPurgeBatch.
